quarantinePolicy.strategy: Detect future rows via detectFutureDateRows(); exclude via buildAsOfWhereClause() in all queries
quarantinePolicy.deletionPolicy: NO DELETION — rows remain in DB; excluded at query layer only
quarantinePolicy.writePolicy: NO DB WRITES — read-only quarantine observability

overallNote: Future-date rows exist in DB but are excluded at query layer by buildAsOfWhereClause(). No rows deleted. WARN is expected until source data pipeline removes future rows.
observabilityNote: Future-date quarantine observability. Research tool only. Not investment advice.
